title: New Zealand DSM Hillshade
description: Hillshade generated from the New Zealand LiDAR 1m DSM using GDAL’s default hillshading parameters of 315˚ azimuth and 45˚ elevation angle.

providers.name: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand

capture_area.title: Capture area
capture_area.description: Boundary of the total capture area for this collection. May include some areas of nodata where capture was attempted but unsuccessful. Geometries are simplified.
